title: beskid_tracker fully implemented
description:
Production-ready roadmap app: SQLite source of truth, scoped GitHub bidirectional sync (active version + bugs), settings dialog, version-scoped kanban, seed import, auth hub autopairing, and operational Coolify deploy.

## Provenance
- **Catalog cutoff:** [`aaddd32`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/aaddd32) → [`ee88edf`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/ee88edf) on **beskid** (2026-05-26 – 2026-06-07)
- **Anchor commit:** [`6438ae8`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/6438ae8)

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4 (Platform services, auth, and delivery tooling)
- **Status:** In progress — DB model, auth autopairing, kanban, and container CI landed; production webhook validation and roadmap labels remain
- **Workstreams:** `tracker-implementation`, `repo-cicd`
